demographics.living_situation: lives at home; an adult child is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The gnawing pain in my stomach never stops, I've lost a massive amount of weight, and I just vomited up something that looked like black dirt. (Reported with help from his adult child, who is with him.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: About two hours ago he vomited up dark material like coffee grounds, the deep stomach pain won't stop, and he's so weak and exhausted he can't stand up — his adult child got scared and called.

symptom_narrative.onset: Constant gnawing pain high in the belly for about 5 months, worse over the last few weeks; the dark 'coffee-ground' vomiting started about 2 hours ago.
symptom_narrative.duration: 5 months of the pain and weight loss; the vomiting of dark material began today.
symptom_narrative.character: A constant, deep, dull gnawing ache high in the middle of the stomach — not a sharp or crampy pain.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The pain never eases, and the exhaustion is the worst he's ever felt — he can't get out of bed on his own.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: High up in the middle of the belly, under the ribs.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: There all the time and slowly getting worse; nothing makes it come and go.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: Nothing helps — eating doesn't ease it, and antacids and his prescription stomach tablets have made no difference.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: It doesn't seem to be set off by anything in particular; it's just constant.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: He fills up after only a few mouthfuls and can't finish even small meals; he's lost about 12 kg without trying; he feels very weak, drained and lightheaded.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: He's had months of indigestion and heartburn, but never vomited anything dark like this before.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: Bedbound and very frail — cannot stand or walk to the bathroom without help.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Months of indigestion / heartburn that hasn't improved despite prescription acid tablets
past_medical_history.how_managed: Prescribed a twice-daily stomach/acid tablet, taken regularly, with no relief

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: esomeprazole 40 mg twice a day (prescription stomach/acid tablet)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Adult child is present at the bedside and made the call; the patient is bedbound and too weak to stand.

objective_data_offered.value: A basin next to the bed holds a small amount of dark material that looks like coffee grounds or black dirt
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the adult child over chat; appearance only, not analysed

objective_data_offered.value: He looks very thin, gaunt and pale
His adult child says he is too weak to stand, has been lying in bed, and seems drained and lightheaded
About 12 kg lost over roughly 5 months without trying
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate, not a measured serial weight
